vision.one_line: Reusable schemas and CLI for repo-local `.go/` agent workflow state.
vision.north_star: Agentic engineering state is clone-readable, repo-local, and verifiable without a central task database.
vision.promise: A fresh clone explains the workflow contract, validates locally, and shows what proof is required before claiming success.

principles.title: Agent-first product surface
principles.rule: Optimize structured contracts, schemas, fixtures, checks, and evidence over prose-first browsing.
bad: strategy prose as source of truth

principles.title: Repo-local source of truth
principles.rule: Project workflow state lives in `.go/` beside project code.

principles.title: JSON/JSONL first
principles.rule: Machine-consumable artifacts are JSON or JSONL; Markdown is narrative only.
bad: canonical state only in README prose

principles.title: Synthetic public examples
principles.rule: Public examples must avoid private vault/customer/person data and secrets.

non_goals: broad migration of existing AW Lite tasks
central vault execution database under a new name

acceptance_scorecard.question: Can a fresh clone validate the repo locally?
Can an agent consume the contract without scraping prose?
Is the repository public-safe?
acceptance_scorecard.pass_condition: No secrets/private artifacts in current tree or checked history signals.

review_checklist: Verify no private data or credentials
residual_risk_wording: This repo is an early public spike; real-project pilots are still needed before broad migration.
